full_text:
Sun Yu
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Sun Yu. Brother of Sun Quan, is used to support Zhou Yu’s attack on Liu Zhang. Sun Yu was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom.
